name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M46932 [Premium Enhanced Version]. The leather is authentic Italian Grade A material from the official factory, focusing on quality, full steel hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, Grade A high-quality output, comprehensively upgraded again. The photos match the product. Comes with a complete set of packaging. Dimensions: 21*23*10CM
